result: Data cleaning completed successfully. The R script processed 9 wave datasets from the LSYPE cohort study, merged them by NSID using full_join, standardized missing value codes across all waves (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -1=Not applicable, -3=Not asked), created age-specific sex variables (sex14-sex32), generated a consolidated sex variable prioritizing most recent valid responses, and output the cleaned data to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 rows and 12 columns.
